description: Analyze one month of 10-minute wind turbine SCADA data in ~/Documents/wind_scada_2022.xlsx. In the 'SCADA' sheet, calculate 'Lost_Energy_kWh' as (Theoretical_Power_kW - Active_Power_kW) / 6 when Theoretical_Power_kW is greater than Active_Power_kW, and 0 otherwise. Classify each row into an 'Operating_State' using this priority: 'LOW_WIND' if Wind_Speed_ms < 3.5; 'FAULT' if Active_Power_kW <= 0; 'UNDERPERFORMING' if Lost_Energy_kWh > 50; and 'NORMAL' otherwise. Create a 'Monthly_Report' sheet with headers 'State', 'Count', and 'Lost_Energy_Sum' summarizing the data for each state. Calculate the 'Financial Loss' as the sum of lost energy from 'FAULT' and 'UNDERPERFORMING' states multiplied by 0.075. Save the updated workbook to ~/Documents/wind_scada_2022.xlsx.

metadata.data_source: La Haute Borne / Turbine SCADA open dataset
